subtitles.original: ...僕らはまた 歩き続けるさ
subtitles.english: ...we'll keep on walking again.

subtitles.original: すべての意味が分かるのならば
subtitles.english: If we knew the meaning of everything...

subtitles.original: この瞳で何を見つめるのだろう
subtitles.english: What would we gaze at with these eyes?

subtitles.original: IT'S NOW AND ALWAYS
subtitles.english: It's now and always

subtitles.original: (HOW DID WE GET THIS FAR? DID WE GET THIS FAR NA~)
subtitles.english: (How did we get this far? Did we get this far, na~)

subtitles.original: ALWAYS
subtitles.english: Always

subtitles.original: (WE'RE MAKING A BRAND NEW START, JUST A BRAND NEW START NA~)
subtitles.english: (We're making a brand new start, just a brand new start, na~)

subtitles.original: ALWAYS
subtitles.english: Always

subtitles.original: (NOTHING WILL HOLD ME DOWN, NEVER HOLD ME DOWN NA~)
subtitles.english: (Nothing will hold me down, never hold me down, na~)

subtitles.original: ALWAYS
subtitles.english: Always

subtitles.original: WAVE GOOD BYE TO ME!
subtitles.english: Wave goodbye to me!

subtitles.original: AROUND THE WORLD 君だけのために
subtitles.english: Around the world, just for you

subtitles.original: AROUND THE WORLD 探し続けるよ
subtitles.english: Around the world, I'll keep searching

subtitles.original: AROUND THE WORLD 奇跡のかけらを
subtitles.english: Around the world, the fragments of miracles

subtitles.original: BUT DON'T RUN AWAY CAUSE IF IT'S NOT OK!
subtitles.english: But don't run away, 'cause if it's not okay!

subtitles.original: YEAH EY AND YOU KNOW IT'S GONNA BE RAINING
subtitles.english: Yeah ey, and you know it's gonna be raining

subtitles.original: AND YOU KNOW IT'S GONNA BE HARD
subtitles.english: And you know it's gonna be hard

subtitles.original: AS LONG AS WE TRUST EACH OTHER
subtitles.english: As long as we trust each other

subtitles.original: NOTHING'S GONNA BREAK APART OH NO! NO!
subtitles.english: Nothing's gonna break apart, oh no! No!

subtitles.original: IF YA WANNA BE SOMEBODY, GET UP ON YA FEET AND GO
subtitles.english: If ya wanna be somebody, get up on ya feet and go

subtitles.original: I KNOW WE'RE GONNA MEET EACH OTHER SOMEWHERE AROUND THE GLOBE
subtitles.english: I know we're gonna meet each other somewhere around the globe

subtitles.original: AROUND THE WORLD
subtitles.english: Around the world

subtitles.original: AROUND THE WORLD いつでも自分に
subtitles.english: Around the world, always to myself

subtitles.original: AROUND THE WORLD 負けている人は
subtitles.english: Around the world, those who are losing

subtitles.original: AROUND THE WORLD 何も掴めない
subtitles.english: Around the world, cannot grasp anything

subtitles.original: BUT DON'T RUN AWAY CAUSE IF IT'S NOT OK!
subtitles.english: But don't run away, 'cause if it's not okay!

subtitles.original: BUT DON'T RUN AWAY CAUSE IF IT'S NOT OK!
subtitles.english: But don't run away, 'cause if it's not okay!

subtitles.original: I'LL CHANGE THAT WORLD INTO SOMETHING BETTER HONEY!
subtitles.english: I'll change that world into something better, honey!

subtitles.original: 特報 その②
subtitles.english: [Special Announcement Part 2]

subtitles.original: 儒烏風亭らでん × THE NATIONAL GALLERY LONDON
subtitles.english: [Juufuutei Raden × The National Gallery, London]

subtitles.original: 儒烏風亭らでん ロンドン ナショナル・ギャラリー コラボ決定!!
subtitles.english: [Juufuutei Raden & London National Gallery Collaboration Confirmed!!]

subtitles.original: ハレとケでテンポにのって あなたに...
subtitles.english: Riding the tempo of ordinary and extraordinary days, to you...

subtitles.original: この想い 純粋に伝えたい
subtitles.english: I want to convey these feelings purely...

subtitles.original: あたし世界 見せてあげる
subtitles.english: I will show you the world.

subtitles.original: 絵画一番 やっちゃって
subtitles.english: Art is number one, let's do it!

subtitles.original: ファンファーレに風吹いて 打ち立てる
subtitles.english: The wind blows through the fanfare, establishing...

subtitles.original: キャンバスと交わり 時を越え
subtitles.english: interacting with the canvas, crossing time.

subtitles.original: 手拍子に乗せて
subtitles.english: Riding on the handclaps...

subtitles.original: いってらっしゃい 見てらっしゃい
subtitles.english: Off you go, come and see!

subtitles.original: はぁ〜、はい！
subtitles.english: Phew, okay!

subtitles.original: ということで、なんと！
subtitles.english: So, guess what!

subtitles.original: 私、儒烏風亭らでんと
subtitles.english: I, Juufuutei Raden, and...

subtitles.original: ロンドン・ナショナル・ギャラリーさんとのコラボが決定しましたー！
subtitles.english: my collaboration with the London National Gallery has been confirmed!

subtitles.original: ナショナル・ギャラリーさんといえば
subtitles.english: Speaking of the National Gallery,

subtitles.original: モネ、ゴッホ、ターナー...
subtitles.english: Monet, Van Gogh, Turner...

subtitles.original: もう、とにかく色んな画家さんたちの超有名な作品をいっぱい所蔵されているところなんですが
subtitles.english: it's a place that houses so many famous works by various painters!

subtitles.original: なんと、そんなナショナル・ギャラリーさんとのコラボ
subtitles.english: And guess what, this collaboration with the National Gallery is called...

subtitles.original: 「儒烏風亭らでんの瞳に映る 世界の名画」
subtitles.english: "The World's Masterpieces Reflected in Juufuutei Raden's Eyes"

subtitles.original: 〜A SHARED ART JOURNEY〜 コラボ決定です！すごい！
subtitles.english: "~A Shared Art Journey~"! The collaboration is confirmed! Amazing!

subtitles.original: さあ、これで、とある3つの名画とコラボしてるんですが、みんなわかるかな？
subtitles.english: Now, we are collaborating with three specific masterpieces. Can everyone guess what they are?

subtitles.original: 3つね、3つあるんだけど
subtitles.english: Three of them, there are three.

subtitles.original: えー、では、左からいきましょうか。
subtitles.english: Well, shall we start from the left?

subtitles.original: えー、左、ターナー 「雨、蒸気、速度―グレート・ウェスタン鉄道」
subtitles.english: On the left is Turner's "Rain, Steam, and Speed - The Great Western Railway".

subtitles.original: そして、真ん中、モネの 「睡蓮の池」
subtitles.english: And in the middle is Monet's "The Water-Lily Pond".

subtitles.original: オフィス、一番右、これは皆さんお分かりでしょう、ゴッホの「ひまわり」
subtitles.english: And on the far right, you all probably know this, is Van Gogh's "Sunflowers"!

subtitles.original: そして今回、コラボ商品が
subtitles.english: And this time, we have collaboration merchandise!

subtitles.original: ございます！全8種あるんですよ。じゃあ、1つずつね、ちょっと紹介していきましょうか。だんっ！
subtitles.english: There are eight types in total! Let's introduce them one by one. Ta-dah!

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: えー、まず左上からいきましょうか。
subtitles.english: Let's start from the top left.

subtitles.original: まずはフレグランスミストセットです。
subtitles.english: First is the Fragrance Mist Set.

subtitles.original: らでんが監修・考案したフレグランスミスト。3点の名画が持つイメージを香りで表現しました。
subtitles.english: This fragrance mist was supervised and designed by Raden. We expressed the images of the three masterpieces through scents.

subtitles.original: 本商品はアルコールフリーのフレグランスミストなので、色んな場面に合わせて使用可能です。
subtitles.english: Since this product is an alcohol-free fragrance mist, you can use it to suit various occasions.

subtitles.original: じゃあ、お隣いきましょうか。
subtitles.english: Next, let's move to the one beside it.

subtitles.original: えー、その隣、ローラーボールペン。3つの名画のエッセンスと儒烏風亭らでんの家紋を見事に融合させたデザインでございます。
subtitles.english: Beside it is the Rollerball Pen. It features a design that beautifully fuses the essence of the three masterpieces with Juufuutei Raden's family crest.

subtitles.original: えー、じゃあ次は
subtitles.english: And next...

subtitles.original: 左下、えー、カップ&ソーサーセット。
subtitles.english: On the bottom left, the Cup & Saucer Set.

subtitles.original: 描き下ろしイラストからインスピレーションを得た、ボーンチャイナ製のカップ&ソーサーセットでございます。
subtitles.english: This bone china cup and saucer set is inspired by the newly drawn illustration.

subtitles.original: ソーサーの中心には儒烏風亭らでんの名前も記載されています。
subtitles.english: Juufuutei Raden's name is also printed at the center of the saucer.

subtitles.original: 最近らでんも紅茶飲めるようになったんでお揃いにしましょうや！
subtitles.english: Lately, I've also become able to drink black tea, so let's match!

subtitles.original: えー、そしてその隣がスカーフ！
subtitles.english: And next to that is the Scarf!

subtitles.original: 新たに描き下ろしたイラスト要素を組み合わせ...
subtitles.english: combining the newly drawn illustration elements...

responses.thoughts:
**Finalizing the Subtitle Data**

Okay, so the user wants me to generate a structured JSON output with accurate subtitles, and I'm ready. My analysis confirms the video segment begins at 00:00.000, and is by Hololive VTuber Juufuutei Raden. She's singing "Around The World", and it's definitely the Japanese version of Monkey Majik's song, with some English lyrics peppered in.

I've painstakingly transcribed the Japanese lyrics and made good English translations, paying close attention to the timings. I've noted screen text, vocal timings, and even background vocals to be thorough. I went through the entire video carefully. Then, I cross-referenced the lyrics to confirm the original Monkey Majik lyrics. **Correcting a Validation Error**

Okay, so I just noticed a critical error in my data. My start time for "特報 その②" was recorded correctly as 02:13.000, but the end time was mistakenly entered as 01:17.500 instead of 02:17.500, which, of course, caused a validation error. *That's sloppy!* I need to fix this immediately.
